steps.title: Locate the requested group
steps.content: The horizontal axis labels the groups from $1$ through $10$. The question asks about group $6$, so move to the bar directly above the label $6$.

steps.title: Read the bar height
steps.content: The top of the bar for group $6$ lines up with the $40$ mark on the vertical axis. The vertical axis measures number of cans, so group $6$ collected $40$ cans.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The graph value for group $6$ is $40$, so the answer is 40.
